description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, thick handle. The front features bold, stylized text in red and black, reading 'KADE MATTERS' and another line beneath it, both slightly distorted. The side of the cup displays a cracked motif with blue text inside, and the opposite side features a cartoonish face with a mustache and expressive eyebrows, set against a yellow background. The cup's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The interior is plain and unadorned, typical of a standard drinking vessel.
description: A white ceramic cup with a thick handle, bold text, a cracked motif, and a cartoon face on its surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing bold, stylized text in red and black on the cup's body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick handle and a cracked motif with blue text.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the cracked motif and part of the cartoon face with a yellow background.
description_view_3: Rear view dominated by the cartoon face with a mustache and yellow background, with part of the text visible on the side.
